urdu transliteration text:
Ab Ghar Ko Chalo Khaak Se Uththo Ali Akbar
Rise Up From The Sand Ali Akbar, Let’s Go Home

Ponhche Jo Husein Ibne Ali Laashe Pisar Par
Wo Haal Nazar Aayaa Chhuri Chal Gayi Dil Par
english translation text:
When Hussain-ibne-ali Arrived At The Body Of His Son
The Sight Of His State Was A Knife To His Heart

urdu transliteration text:
Yeh Kehke Zamin Par Gir-e Bete Ke Baraabar
Aayaa Hai Pidar Hosh Men Aawo Ali Akbar
Your Father Has Come, Wake Up Ali Akbar
english translation text: Saying This, He Fell To The Ground Beside His Son

urdu transliteration text:
Ab Ghar Ko Chalo Khaak Se Uththo Ali Akbar
Rise Up From The Sand Ali Akbar, Let’s Go Home

Zaalim Koi Bekas Ko Bataa Taa Na Thaa Rastaa
Chhaayaa Thaa Nigaaho Men Andheraa Hi Andheraa
english translation text:
The Enemies Would Not Show Me The Way To You
My Vision Has Been Overcome By Darkness Upon Darkness

urdu transliteration text:
Aayaa Hai Pidar Paas Tere Thonkare Khaataa
Aankhon Ko Huwaa Kyaa Meri Puchho Ali Akbar
english translation text:
Your Father Has Come To You After Many Struggles
Ask Me What Has Happened To My Eyes Ali Akbar

urdu transliteration text:
Ab Ghar Ko Chalo Khaak Se Uththo Ali Akbar
Rise Up From The Sand Ali Akbar, Let’s Go Home

Kyun Paaun Ragadte Ho Kahaan Dard Uthaa Hai
Batlaao Meri Jaan Meraa Dil Baith Rahaa Hai.
english translation text:
Why Are You Thrashing Your Feet, Where Does It Hurt?
Show Me My Love, My Heart Is Sinking

urdu transliteration text:
Kyun Haath Hai Sin-e Pe Kahaan Zakhm Lagaa Hai
Phat Jaaegaa Dil Baap Kaa Bolo Ali Akbar
My Heart Will Burst, Tell Your Father Ali Akbar
english translation text: Why Is Your Hand On Your Chest, Where Have You Been Wounded?

urdu transliteration text:
Ab Ghar Ko Chalo Khaak Se Uththo Ali Akbar
Rise Up From The Sand Ali Akbar, Let’s Go Home

Ai Laal Tasawwur Men Thaa Maake Teraa Sehraa
Hai Der Se Darwaaza-e Khaimaa Pe Woh Dukhiyaa
english translation text:
Oh My Son, Your Mother’s Thoughts Were Of Your Wedding
For A Long Time She Has Been Standing At The Door Of The Tent

urdu transliteration text:
Kyaa Jaake Bataaun Jo Huwaa Haal Tumhaaraa
Lailaa Se Kahun Kyaa Yeh Bataao Ali Akbar
english translation text:
What Will I Go Back And Tell Her About Your State
Tell Me This Ali Akbar, What Will I Tell Layla?

urdu transliteration text:
Ab Ghar Ko Chalo Khaak Se Uththo Ali Akbar
Rise Up From The Sand Ali Akbar, Let’s Go Home

Nawha Hai Labo Par Haiu Lahu Aankhon Se Jaari
Ham Kab Se Khade Rote Hai Baali Pe Tumhaari
english translation text:
With Lamentation On The Lips; (Tears Of) Blood Flows From The Eyes
For How Long Have We Been Standing Here, Crying By Your Side?

urdu transliteration text:
Khaayaa Na Taras Tumne Gharibi Pe Hamaari
Dil Baap Ka Is Tarhaa Na Todo Ali Akbar
Do Not Break Your Father's Heart, Ali Akbar
english translation text: Do You Have No Pity On Our Loneliness?

urdu transliteration text:
Ab Ghar Ko Chalo Khaak Se Uththo Ali Akbar
Rise Up From The Sand Ali Akbar, Let’s Go Home

Ab Der Jo Ki Tumne To Karti Huwi Zaari
Be Pardaa Bahan Aaegi Maqtal Men Hamaari
english translation text:
Now That You’ve Delayed Returning, She Is Lamenting
Without Her Veil, My Sister Will Come To The Battlefield

urdu transliteration text:
Maadar Kahin Marjaae Na Sadmense Tumhaari
Baabaa Bhi Nahin Jine-ke Sunlo Ali Akbar
english translation text:
May Your Mother Not Die From This Heartache
Your Father Also Will Not Survive This, Listen Ali Akbar

urdu transliteration text:
Ab Ghar Ko Chalo Khaak Se Uththo Ali Akbar
Rise Up From The Sand Ali Akbar, Let’s Go Home
Qabu Me Nahi Qalb Ulajtaa Hai Kaleja
english translation text:
Kis Tarha Se Dekhe Ye Pidar Haal TumhaaraaO! How Can Your Father Bear To See Your State?
My Heart Is Uncontrolled, Frayed!

urdu transliteration text:
Pehlu Me Hai Dil Baap Kaa Paththar Nahi Betaa
Aage Mere Is Tarha Na Tadpo Ali Akbar
english translation text:
This Chest Has A Father's Heart, Not A Stone, My Son!
Do Not Thus Writhe In Pain Before Me Ali Akbar!

urdu transliteration text:
Ab Ghar Ko Chalo Khaak Se Uththo Ali Akbar
Rise Up From The Sand Ali Akbar, Let’s Go Home
